meaning: n.纯爱,爱人,[植]轮叶王孙(顶开一花,呈浅绿色)
examples: Now, if you have had Truelove, please cherish it.
The author thought truelove was the most precious in the world. It was because the person who would accompany you to the end was the lover.
In 1997 Thornton joined the cast of the long running comedy series Last of the Summer Wine, as the character Herbert "Truly" Truelove.
